programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Long-time friends and now partners, Kirby and Menna are on the hunt for their perfect home together; they are both avid water enthusiasts and want a home where they can have great parties.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Nova Scotia natives Kim and Ryan have wanted an oceanfront home for as long as they have been together. They decided to downsize their home to buy a boat and live closer to the water. Even after downsizing, they still couldn't afford a home right on the water. Now, after years of saving, they are in the right financial place to look for their dream oceanfront home and a place to park their boat permanently.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Lovebirds Sydney and Sebastian have decided to take on their next big adventure and invest in a coastal dream property where they can live with their young boys while running a hospitality business; while they have years of real estate investing under their belts, they've never run this type of business before, so they are excited to try.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Emily and Kye are home flippers and landlords; since they have been together, they have only ever lived in homes with tenants, but after their second daughter was born, they decided they had had enough of sharing space.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Judith and John fell in love by chance when he renovated her home; they got married and moved into a beautiful condo to live an urban lifestyle in Vancouver, but the condo life isn't giving them the family entertaining space they were each so used to; after a trip to Nova Scotia, they realized that is where they need to be, and now they are on the hunt for their forever home.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Susanna and Will have spent their entire relationship renovating and flipping homes; they have never lived in a home that is just for them; with their two boys out of the house, they have decided it's time to have the home they've always wanted.
